h2c3edb8cgd947g4e39g88d5ge214edd4370d: The Blade of Frontiers. What a thrill for the children.
h2cc0bf37gd5c6g4793gb39cg17cee243ec65: They're tough kids. Smart, too. The future's in good hands.
h536b6276g7e77g4affgb03fg9dbede909644: I think you've inspired them enough today.
h06e02696gfcebg47dfga72eg863940057b25: Not now, sorry. I have to comfort these little warriors.
h15b812fdg74ddg443agb2afgdfaf399045c2: Not now, sorry. I have to comfort these little warriors.
h91b7cb7fgdad8g4715g9c35ge54c2e8736aa: Look at them beaming.You did that.
heafb4f1dg1c9eg497cga4bfgeeec9c023888: Thanks for spending time with the kids. I just wish... well. Thanks.
h4f75afd8g8eeag4697gabdcg33c35e838706: Can't talk now. The children need me.
h089bea69ga74bg4955g845egbf2e3363cd37: Can't talk now. The children need me.
h60779ae7g90f2g4d16ga8c2g36b96ae17fc6: I saw you at the gates. You fight well.
h75d95181g1e79g415bg9d5eg086369125a47: A few words for the kids? Spare a story or two?
h50279d5bg7abag43c2gb3f4gec3349e59c32: These hatchlings are weak. Your teachings will fail.
h1a11ab51g9d3ag4b40g9033g86ff4fc73428: It's that or teach them to beg for their lives.
h781d84a1g6577g4527g833eg7c4db5f9693f: The goblins will chase us to Baldur's Gate and these kids know it.
ha07809f0g5536g4cd9g98bagd3a038793275: A warrior like you could lift their spirits.
h6527b98eg4c37g404dga43agf742ea813af3: I once sliced out a scavver's eye and ate it whole - and not out of hunger.
h45ba35b6g3c89g4e82gb4f3g18b10b165bfa: I will rip off a horrid mind flayer's head and gift it to my lich queen!
h84075023gece9g4d3fg8857gdae2a2dd4f86: I crawled inside a red dragon's corpse to stay warm among the Tears of Selûne.
h457e4b51g3e0ag4ddcgbae7g421c892fb163: I slit my own cousin's throat and tasted her blood.
ha0cdd819g61d8g46a4gb3b0g3297dd0a0f7f: A few words for the kids? Spare a story or two?
ha468318cgfca9g4dbdga466g50536ac61766: They're just children - why are you teaching them to fight?
h8a5a1c91gf1b7g4ed9g9744g3d0baebb17d3: I'll lift their spirits by wiping out that whole camp of goblins by myself.
h40605d61gf5d6g49b7ga24bgaa46915151a9: Thanks. I prefer when they smile.
hb8b48cf6g4890g451cg8e1cg3a08c3122cd8: You're just going to get them killed - probably by each other.
h4a91e0e2g2b7eg4ea0gb8e8g81d392bacc62: Good job. Now they're even more scared.
h12cbb6aeg6834g4017g8868gd8a51d421494: Good job. Little ears hear far - I better take care of this.
h59e0d4e3g1f5ag4143g9ed8gc0fa0608c22b: Soak the battlefield with blood. Do not resist death, but embrace it!
h5da6f3abg7584g4232g9ff4g41d147506d45: Be strong and watch over your kin. In trust there is victory!
h9391e391ge014g4b2dga67bg8d5373ad09cc: Bad news, children: you're all going to die.
hf4294048g42beg4e06g8a4cg40c28fffbd00: You must outsmart and outmanoeuvre. Your greatest weapon is your cunning!
hfd839e5ag3707g4f66g8289ga63c3cf1d5db: After great adversity comes triumph. Honour and glory!
